finding.summary: A no-source incremental run selected the latest source composite at or before its cutoff and could overwrite a future-seeded synthetic watermark with an older composite.
finding.publishedDataImpact: None. Published fact counts and checksums remained unchanged, and the six public data-quality controls passed.
finding.lineageImpact: The no-change run was incorrectly recorded as watermark owner for both source ledgers.

migration.name: monotonic_composite_watermarks
migration.behavior: Repairs from latest already-published fact composites, clears zero-change lineage ownership, and prevents regression or equal-composite lineage rewrites.

verification.pgTap: 120/120 pass on a fresh database reset

boundaries: All records are synthetic portfolio data.
The historical pipeline-run record is retained as observed evidence; only the current operational ledger was repaired.
This incident evidence is not a NICO production claim, approval, UAT result, or scale benchmark.
